title: Slack signature verification → valid/invalid/expired
evidence: All 5 TC-019 tests passed in 146ms (374/374 total tests, 55 files): - ✓ TC-019: valid HMAC signature → HTTP 200 - ✓ TC-019: invalid signature → HTTP 403 - ✓ TC-019: timestamp 6 minutes old → HTTP 403 (replay protection) - ✓ TC-019: missing X-Slack-Signature → HTTP 403 - ✓ TC-019: url_verification type → returns {challenge} synchronously Signature enforcement prevents unauthorized event injection — confirmed.
